challenge.title: Korak 12
challenge.description:
Kao poslednji korak, dodajte deklaraciju za console.log() koja sadrži poruku: "Workshop complete! You now know how to use includes() and slice()."

Čestitam! Završili ste radionicu za proveru sekvenca slova.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Treba da napišete "Workshop complete! You now know how to use includes() and slice()." u konzoli.
tests.testString: assert.match(__helpers.removeJSComments(code), /console\.log\s*\(\s*('|"|`)Workshop complete! You now know how to use includes\(\) and slice\(\)\.\1\s*\)/);

challengeFiles.name: script
